payload.answer: Inspection requested for memory ID mem_123. No durable memory should be committed from this debug/inspection command alone. The actual stored content for mem_123 was not provided in the input, so no current facts can be asserted.

entity_resolution.reason: The user requested inspection of an existing memory record (mem_123), not creation or update of durable memory.

details: Recognized command as a memory inspection/debug request.
Did not infer or commit any new durable memory.
Preserved ambiguity because the contents of mem_123 were not included.

repair_options: Provide the stored content or metadata for mem_123 to inspect it.
If mem_123 is missing, verify the memory ID or list available memories.
If mem_123 contains incorrect or superseded information, request an explicit update, deletion, or repair.
